heading: Provider requirements to protect patients and improve the accuracy of provider directory information
label: 300gg–139 Provider requirements to protect patients and improve the accuracy of provider directory information

children.text: when the provider or facility begins a network agreement with a plan or with an issuer with respect to certain coverage;
when the provider or facility terminates a network agreement with a plan or with an issuer with respect to certain coverage;

when there are material changes to the content of provider directory information of the provider or facility described in , , or , as applicable; andsection 300gg–115(a)(1) of this titlesection 1185i(a)(1) of title 29section 9820(a)(1) of title 26
at any other time (including upon the request of such issuer or plan) determined appropriate by the provider, facility, or the Secretary.

children.heading: Refunds to enrollees
children.label: b Refunds to enrollees
children.text: If a health care provider submits a bill to an enrollee based on cost-sharing for treatment or services provided by the health care provider that is in excess of the normal cost-sharing applied for such treatment or services provided in-network, as prohibited under , , or , as applicable, and the enrollee pays such bill, the provider shall reimburse the enrollee for the full amount paid by the enrollee in excess of the in-network cost-sharing amount for the treatment or services involved, plus interest, at an interest rate determined by the Secretary.section 300gg–115(b) of this titlesection 1185i(b) of title 29section 9820(b) of title 26

that the plan or issuer remove, at the time of termination of such contract, the provider from a directory of the plan or issuer described in , , or , as applicable; orsection 300gg–115(a) of this titlesection 1185i(a) of title 29section 9820(a) of title 26

that the plan or issuer bear financial responsibility, including under , , or , as applicable, for providing inaccurate network status information to an enrollee.section 300gg–115(b) of this titlesection 1185i(b) of title 29section 9820(b) of title 26

children.heading: Definition
children.label: d Definition
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “provider directory information” includes the names, addresses, specialty, telephone numbers, and digital contact information of individual health care providers, and the names, addresses, telephone numbers, and digital contact information of each medical group, clinic, or facility contracted to participate in any of the networks of the group health plan or health insurance coverage involved.

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: e Rule of construction
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to preempt any provision of State law relating to health care provider directories.
